title: Caramelized American Butternut Squash Roast
description: A light and salty solo-dinner American dish featuring caramelized butternut squash, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal. This recipe highlights the natural sweetness of butternut squash balanced with a touch of salt and herbs.

ingredients.name: butternut squash
ingredients.notes: peeled, seeded, and cubed into 1-inch pieces

instructions: In a large bowl, toss the butternut squash cubes with olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and dried thyme until they are evenly coated.
Spread the squash mixture in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
While the squash is roasting, mix the brown sugar and chicken broth in a small bowl.
After the squash has roasted for 20 minutes, brush the sugar and broth mixture evenly over the squash.
Continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the squash is tender and caramelized, flipping the pieces halfway through.
Remove the squash from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
